scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "api,order,payment,inventory,customer,notification" --prefix "[{name}]" "bun --watch services\api-gateway\src\main.ts" "bun --watch services\order-service\src\main.ts" "bun --watch services\payment-service\src\main.ts" "bun --watch services\inventory-service\src\main.ts" "bun --watch services\customer-service\src\main.ts" "bun --watch services\notification-service\src\main.ts"
scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "api,order,payment,inventory,customer,notification" --prefix "[{name}]" "cd services\api-gateway && bun run start" "cd services\order-service && bun run start" "cd services\payment-service && bun run start" "cd services\inventory-service && bun run start" "cd services\customer-service && bun run start" "cd services\notification-service && bun run start"
